items.summary: Update the TimeframeUploadSlot component (frontend/src/components/TimeframeUploadSlot.tsx) and the AnalyzeChart page (frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx) so that each individual upload slot rectangle (M1, M3, M5) becomes clipboard-paste-active when the user clicks or taps on it. When a slot is in the active/focused state, pressing Ctrl+V (or triggering a paste event on mobile) must paste the clipboard image directly into that specific slot only — not into all slots simultaneously. Only one slot can be the active paste target at a time. The active slot must display a visible focus indicator (e.g., a highlighted border or subtle glow) so the user knows which slot will receive the pasted image. Clicking outside any slot or selecting a file/camera image for a different slot deactivates the previous active slot. This replaces any existing global paste listener that pastes into the first available slot regardless of user intent.
